free_text: 94.33 %  S-34,  of 1g in the form of a disc, 2.54 cm

Above the  two-neutron reaction threshold,  20.1 MeV,
the experimental reaction yield curve was  corrected
for  the neutron multiplicity assuming a statistical
reaction yield  curve  correction  for  photoneutron
Using an enriched S-34 target the reaction S-34(g,xn)
has been measured from below threshold, 10.4 MeV, to
28  MeV  by  directly  counting  photoneutrons  as a
function of  bremsstrahlung  energy.  The  resultant
cross  section  shows  gross  splitting  in  the GDR
region. The integrated cross section is discussed in
the  light  of  the  systematics  of  similar nuclei
having  two  neutrons  outside   a   doubly   closed
Data were compiled at the Russia MSU SINP
